name: mungyang
description: 일본 여행 실전 회화 학습 앱 — 준비, 실전, 여행 미션 중심 재설계

scripts.check: tsx scripts/audit-content.ts && tsx scripts/audit-assets.ts && tsx scripts/audit-resources.ts && tsx scripts/audit-audio.ts
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && vite build && tsx scripts/prune-dist-audio.ts && tsx scripts/audit-audio-subset.ts && tsx scripts/report-build-size.ts
